mapper.select: SELECT r.reservation_id,u.name,ro.room_name,r.check_in_date,r.check_out_date, r.check_in_time,r.check_out_time,r.people,r.price,r.payment_time,r.status FROM reservation r JOIN room_info ro ON ro.room_id = r.room_id JOIN stay_info s ON s.stay_id = ro.stay_id JOIN host_info h ON h.host_id = s.host_id AND h.host_id = #{hostId} INNER JOIN user_info u ON u.user_id = r.user_id order by r.status

SELECT r.reservation_id, DATE_FORMAT(r.check_in_date, '%Y.%m.%d') check_in_date, DATE_FORMAT(r.check_out_date, '%Y.%m.%d') check_out_date, r.people, r.status, si.stay_name, si.location, u.email FROM reservation r JOIN room_info ri ON r.room_id = ri.room_id JOIN stay_info si ON ri.stay_id = si.stay_id JOIN user_info u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userID} order by check_in_date
mapper.update: update reservation set status = #{status} where reservation_id = #{reservationId} and status = '예약 대기'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (user_id, room_id, check_in_date, check_out_date,check_in_time,check_out_time,people,price,payment_time,status) VALUES (#{userId},#{roomId},#{checkInDate},#{checkOutDate},#{checkInTime},#{checkOutTime},#{people},#{price},now(),'예약 대기');
mapper.select: SELECT price FROM room_info WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
SELECT user_id AS id, name, email, phone FROM user_info WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pending_reservation ( order_id, user_id, room_id, check_in_date, check_out_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, people, amount, payment_status ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{userId}, #{roomId}, #{checkInDate}, #{checkOutDate}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkOutTime}, #{people}, #{price}, '결제대기' )
mapper.select: SELECT pending_id AS pendingId, order_id AS orderId, user_id AS userId, room_id AS roomId, check_in_date AS checkInDate, check_out_date AS checkOutDate, check_in_time AS checkInTime, check_out_time AS checkOutTime, people, amount, payment_status AS paymentStatus FROM pending_reservation WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation ( user_id, room_id, check_in_date, check_out_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, people, price, order_id, payment_key, payment_status, paid_amount, payment_time, status, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{roomId}, #{checkInDate}, #{checkOutDate}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkOutTime}, #{people}, #{amount}, #{orderId}, #{paymentKey}, '결제완료', #{amount}, NOW(), '예약 대기', NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE pending_reservation SET payment_status = '결제완료' WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND payment_status = '결제대기'
UPDATE pending_reservation SET payment_status = '결제실패' WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND payment_status = '결제대기'
mapper.select: SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, r.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name, si.stay_name AS stayName, ri.room_name AS roomName, DATE_FORMAT(r.check_in_date, '%Y.%m.%d') AS checkInDate, DATE_FORMAT(r.check_out_date, '%Y.%m.%d') AS checkOutDate, r.people AS people, r.price AS price, r.status AS status FROM reservation r JOIN user_info u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN room_info ri ON r.room_id = ri.room_id JOIN stay_info si ON ri.stay_id = si.stay_id WHERE r.order_id = #{orderId}
